mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_training_application
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_training_application WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_training_application WHERE application_no LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_training_application (application_no, course_id, course_name, course_date, applicant_name, applicant_dept, applicant_emp_no, applicant_phone, applicant_username, apply_date, status, reason, meal_option, transport_option, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{applicationNo}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{courseDate}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantDept}, #{applicantEmpNo}, #{applicantPhone}, #{applicantUsername}, #{applyDate}, #{status}, #{reason}, #{mealOption}, #{transportOption}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_training_application SET applicant_name = #{applicantName}, applicant_dept = #{applicantDept}, applicant_phone = #{applicantPhone}, reason = #{reason}, meal_option = #{mealOption}, transport_option= #{transportOption}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_training_application SET status = #{status}, approved_by = COALESCE(#{approvedBy}, approved_by), approved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'APPROVED' THEN GETDATE() ELSE approved_at END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'REJECTED' THEN #{rejectReason} ELSE reject_reason END, completion_date= CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN #{completionDate,jdbcType=DATE} ELSE completion_date END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE tb_training_application SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
